name: Meringues (Plain and Chocolate Filled)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces bittersweet chocolate, broken in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 225°F.
2. Have egg whites at about 70°F.
3. Beat until foamy in an electric mixer or by hand.
4. Add vanilla.
5. While continuing to beat, add sugar one tablespoon at a time.
6. When the mixture forms stiff peaks on the beater, it is ready for baking.
7. Fill a pastry bag with mixture and pipe onto parchment covered baking sheet, using star tip to create kisses.
8. Bake about 1 hour or longer, depending on size.
9. Turn off oven, open door, and leave in for at least 5 minutes before removing.
10. Cool gradually away from a draft.
11. Remove from sheet when cool.
12. To prepare chocolate ganache, pour hot, scalded cream over chocolate and blend until smooth.
13. Cool.
14. Fill meringues by crushing the bottom lightly with thumb while still warm. Fill hollows with chocolate ganache.
Yield: 3 dozen 1-inch Meringues
